/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wpedantic -Wextra -Weffc++ -Werror -Wshadow -Wpointer-arith -Wcast-qual -Wformat=2 -Wno-unqualified-std-cast-call -g CMakeFiles/router_same_network.dir/router_same_network.cc.o -o router_same_network  libcomp_net_testing_debug.a ../src/libcomp_net_debug.a ../util/libutil_debug.a
